PETITION Petition To Confirm Agent'S Authority Under Durable Power Of Attorney.
Off Calendar Dec-06-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Freedman for Laura Dyer (Agent). James Barringer as Guardian Ad Litem for Naomi Henderson. Barry Brown for Charles Schwab.

Mr. Brown stated the account has been frozen due to a tax lien, that he opposed the request for attorney fees and that he will support the Court Order. Mr. Freedman presented oral argument to support his position with regard to sever the joint brokerage account, that Leslie Wells did not contribute the account and the request for attorney fees. The Court granted the Petition to Sever the Joint Account (subject to receipt of the order). The Court requested counsel to discuss the terms of the order.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: None. (Not Reported)
